title: astragalus tiehmii
intro: Astragalus tiehmii, also known as Tiehm's milkvetch, is a rare species of flowering plant in the pea family. This perennial plant is native to the state of Nevada in the United States and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries. The medicinal properties of Astragalus tiehmii include its adaptogenic and immune-boosting properties, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and improve overall health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and its health benefits include reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function.
